name: @exelixi/modulo-ocr
description: Modulo OCR — lectura de documentos venezolanos con Gemini 2.5 Pro.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix frontend
